summary: Verified SKU dropdown filtering in Record Delivery dialog - All features working correctly. SKU dropdown now shows only account-configured SKUs with prices, auto-populates price on selection, and Add Item button is disabled until account is selected.

details: After selecting 'Test Status Validation Company' account, SKU dropdown shows only 1 SKU from account's sku_pricing
SKU shown: 'Nyla – 330 ml / Silver' at ₹45 (exact SKU configured in account's sku_pricing)
SKU dropdown shows price next to each SKU name
When SKU is selected, unit price field auto-populates with ₹45 (configured price)
Amount calculation works correctly with tax
Shows: 'Showing 1 SKU(s) configured for Test Status Validation Company'
sku_pricing contains enriched SKU data: id, name, price_per_unit, return_bottle_credit

context_for_next_testing_agent: SKU filtering feature in Record Delivery dialog fully implemented and verified. Backend returns enriched sku_pricing array with SKU IDs mapped from master_skus. Frontend correctly filters SKU dropdown based on selectedDeliveryAccount.sku_pricing and auto-populates price.
